headline: Netflix, Target, Transocean And A Financial Stock On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
summary: On Thursday, Netflix shares fell 0.6% to $94.31 and Target declined 2.6% to $115.75, but CME Group gained 2.6% to close at $311.19.
